summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of KiloLab laundry marketplace app completed. All public pages (Landing, Tarifs, FAQ, Contact, BecomeWasher, Login) and NewOrder flow work correctly. Mobile responsive navigation is functional.

minor.issue: Console shows 'Invalid API key' error when fetching washers on NewOrder page - likely RLS/environment config issue
minor.note: The flow still works with fallback 'Réseau Kilolab' option when no washers are found

integration_issues.issue: Supabase API returns 401 error when trying to fetch washers - fallback to 'Réseau Kilolab' works correctly

issues: Minor: console warning '<link rel=preload> uses an unsupported `as` value' - not affecting functionality
Debug section visible on page (shows 'Total Washers approuvés: 0') - should be removed for production

passed_tests: Landing page loads with video background, CTAs, price comparator
Weight slider works correctly (3-15kg range)
Navbar with data-testid attributes works
Desktop navigation links work (Tarifs, FAQ, Contact)
Mobile responsive design - hamburger menu works
Mobile menu opens/closes and contains all navigation links
Tarifs page displays Standard (3€/kg) and Express (5€/kg) options
Tarifs page has Popular badge and comparison section
FAQ page loads with 4 categories and accordion functionality
FAQ accordion expand/collapse works
Contact page with form (email, subject, message fields)
Contact form inputs accept text correctly
BecomeWasher page with video, revenue simulator, benefits
BecomeWasher form flow - Step 1 (info) displays correctly
Revenue simulator slider works (10-100kg range)
Login page with Connexion/Inscription toggle
Login form fields (email, password) work
Forgot password link present
NewOrder multi-step flow works (Formula → Weight → Location → Date → Payment)
NewOrder formula selection (Standard/Express) works
NewOrder weight slider (3-30kg) works
NewOrder location search with fallback to 'Réseau Kilolab'
All pages have proper Helmet meta tags for SEO
Skeleton loading components implemented correctly
Animations (scroll, fade) work on scroll
action_items: Remove debug section from NewOrder.tsx (lines ~550-554 showing 'Debug Recherche' box)
Verify Supabase RLS policies allow anon users to read approved washers
Consider hiding the washer fetch error from console for better UX
critical_code_review_comments: NewOrder.tsx has a debug section (lines 549-554) that should be removed before production
Console logging of washers data should be conditional on dev mode
Good data-testid usage throughout - navbar, CTAs, and form elements have test identifiers

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All UI flows work, minor API integration issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Public pages (Landing, Tarifs, FAQ, Contact, BecomeWasher, Login, NewOrder) all tested and working. The Supabase integration shows an API key error in console when fetching washers, but the fallback flow works. To test authenticated pages (ClientDashboard, WasherDashboard, AdminDashboard), need valid Supabase test credentials. Skeleton loading components are implemented in /src/components/animations/Skeleton.tsx.
